lemon_market_new_listings.description: Good condition.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a dependable daily driver for anyone looking for a functional car at a reasonable price. The exterior shows typical signs of age, including several minor surface scratches and a small dent on the rear passenger side. Inside, the upholstery exhibits some wear and tear, and a few dashboard buttons show fading, though all features remain fully operational. Mechanically, the car starts and runs reliably, having been maintained regularly, though it has higher mileage and may require routine suspension maintenance in the near future. It is a solid, honest vehicle that gets the job done without the frills of a newer model.
This vehicle is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and small dents. The interior shows significant wear on the seats. All mechanical systems are currently operational.

This vehicle is in poor condition. It shows significant wear and damage on both the interior and exterior. There are several major mechanical issues that require repair, and the car is not currently in reliable working order.

Calling all DIY enthusiasts and project-seekers! This vehicle is looking for a new owner who isn't afraid of a little elbow grease. While it definitely needs some significant mechanical and cosmetic attention to get back to its prime, it offers a fantastic foundation for a dedicated restorer or someone looking for a budget-friendly project. It's an honest fixer-upper with plenty of potential for the right person!

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a reliable daily driver. The exterior shows its age with some minor door dings, light scratches, and some clear coat peeling on the roof. Inside, the upholstery is intact but shows typical wear, including a small tear on the driver's seat and some fading of the dashboard plastics. Mechanically, the car is sound and drives well, though it is due for a standard tune-up and the tires have about 30% tread life remaining. It’s an honest car for someone who prioritizes utility over aesthetics.

This exemplary vehicle offers a sophisticated balance of performance and reliability. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it features a pristine cabin environment and a powertrain that delivers consistent, authoritative performance. Having passed our comprehensive multi-point inspection, this automobile stands as a testament to quality engineering and responsible ownership. A superior choice for those seeking refined value.

Hey there! If you're looking for a reliable ride that’s been loved and well-cared for, this is the one for you! It’s in wonderful shape, runs like a dream, and is ready for its next adventure. I’ve enjoyed every mile in it, but it’s time to pass the keys to someone new. Come take it for a spin and see for yourself how great it handles!

This E46 M3 is a mechanically sound example of BMW’s high-revving S54 platform. The 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six features individual throttle bodies and a dual-VANOS system, both recently serviced to ensure precise valve timing and peak volumetric efficiency. Power is routed through a Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox to a variable M differential lock. The chassis has been proactively addressed with subframe reinforcement, mitigating common fatigue points. Equipped with the original suspension geometry and cross-drilled rotors, this vehicle offers the tactile feedback and linear torque curve quintessential to the M-division's engineering heritage.
Used car in good condition. Runs well. Clean interior. Maintenance up to date.

This vehicle represents a fantastic opportunity for a driver seeking a reliable, well-maintained machine that still turns heads. The exterior is finished in a sophisticated metallic paint that retains a deep gloss, with only minor road wear consistent with careful use. Inside, the cabin is remarkably clean and has been kept in a smoke-free environment; the seats are supportive and free of significant wear, while all power features, including the infotainment system and climate control, operate exactly as they should. Under the hood, the engine is strong and responsive, benefiting from a rigorous maintenance schedule. We have recently performed a full synthetic oil change, replaced the air filters, and inspected the suspension to ensure a smooth, quiet ride. The tires have plenty of tread remaining, and the brakes feel firm and confident. This is a solid, honest car that delivers a premium driving experience and is ready to be driven home today with no immediate service needs.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has been subjected to a rigorous multi-point inspection, ensuring optimal performance and reliability for its next discerning owner. Featuring a clean interior and a well-preserved exterior finish, it represents a premier opportunity for those seeking a balance of luxury and long-term value in a pre-owned executive-class vehicle.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, representing an exceptional balance of performance and value. This unit has undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical integrity and long-term reliability. Featuring a clean profile and a well-preserved interior, it offers a refined driving experience for the discerning owner. Invest with confidence in a vehicle that meets our exacting standards for quality and road-readiness.

Hey there! If you're looking for a super reliable ride that's still in great shape, you've found it! This car has been well-loved and runs like a dream. It’s perfect for daily commutes or weekend getaways. I've taken really good care of it, and it's totally ready for its next adventure with a new owner. Feel free to reach out if you want to take it for a spin—I'd love to show it to you!

Used vehicle in good condition. Runs well. Maintenance records available. Clean title.

This vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and daily utility. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish with only minor road-wear consistent with careful ownership. Inside, the cabin is a smoke-free environment featuring premium upholstery that remains supple and supportive, though showing light, natural creasing. Every electronic component—from the dual-zone climate control to the intuitive infotainment system—functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, the car is robust; it has been serviced strictly according to the manufacturer’s schedule, with a smooth-shifting transmission and a responsive engine that delivers power without hesitation. We recently fitted a fresh set of all-season tires and performed a comprehensive brake service, ensuring it is turn-key ready for its next owner. This is a well-loved, honest vehicle that provides a premium driving experience without the new-car price tag.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, representing a premier choice for the discerning driver. Demonstrating a consistent history of care, this automobile offers a refined driving experience and aesthetic appeal that transcends its classification. Thoroughly vetted by our technicians, it stands as a testament to balanced performance and enduring value.

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, the unit has undergone a rigorous professional assessment to ensure peak operational standards. It offers a sophisticated driving experience, combining proven reliability with exceptional value.

Hey there! I’m selling my trusty car and it’s been such a joy to own. It’s in really solid shape, runs like a dream, and has been super reliable for all my daily trips. It’s got a clean look and is ready for its next adventure with a new owner. You’re going to love how smooth it drives! Feel free to reach out if you want to take it for a spin!

This E46 M3 is powered by the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, featuring individual throttle bodies and a 7,900 RPM redline. The powertrain is mated to a precise 6-speed manual transmission and a factory limited-slip differential for optimal torque distribution. This example has undergone critical preventative maintenance, including a comprehensive VANOS system overhaul and subframe reinforcement to ensure structural integrity under high lateral loads. The suspension retains its tactile feedback with refreshed bushings, while the ventilated rotors and multi-piston calipers provide consistent thermal management during spirited driving. A mechanically sound, driver-focused machine that balances raw performance with legendary BMW engineering.
Clean title. Runs well. Minor cosmetic wear. Regular maintenance performed. Ready for immediate sale.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and presents beautifully, offering a fantastic balance of performance and comfort. The exterior retains its original luster, with only minor signs of careful use that are typical for its age. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free; the premium upholstery shows very little wear, and all interior features—including the infotainment system, climate control, and power seats—are fully operational. Mechanically, the car is in excellent health, having received regular fluid changes and scheduled maintenance according to the manufacturer’s guidelines. The engine pulls strongly and the transmission shifts smoothly, providing a confident and quiet ride on both city streets and highways. It comes with a complete set of service records, two sets of keys, and tires with plenty of tread remaining. This is a solid, reliable choice for anyone seeking a well-cared-for vehicle that is ready to drive away today.

Presented for your consideration is a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and consistent performance. This specimen has been subjected to comprehensive inspections to ensure it meets our standards for safety and operational reliability. Offering a sophisticated balance of utility and refinement, this automobile represents a distinguished acquisition for the discerning driver seeking a dependable, high-caliber driving experience.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, representing an exceptional balance of performance and value. This unit has undergone a rigorous selection process to ensure mechanical integrity and consistent aesthetic appeal. Ideally suited for the discerning driver who prioritizes long-term reliability and a refined driving experience, this motorcar stands as a distinguished example of its class.

Hi there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, she’s been absolute perfection. It’s in great condition and has plenty of life left for all your upcoming adventures! Super reliable, clean, and just a joy to drive—I’m looking for someone who will enjoy it as much as I have. Let’s get you behind the wheel!

This E46 M3 is a purist’s specification featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six engine and a tactile Getrag 6-speed manual transmission. The high-revving powerplant delivers linear torque through individual throttle bodies, while the chassis benefits from a reinforced rear subframe and refreshed bushings for optimal torsional rigidity. Recent preventative maintenance includes a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and valve clearance adjustment, ensuring the valvetrain remains precise up to the 8,000 RPM redline. Equipped with a factory limited-slip differential and staggered Style 67 wheels, this example offers the balanced handling and communicative steering feedback synonymous with the M division. It is a mechanically sound driver’s car that balances raw performance with daily usability.
Used car in good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Runs well. Minor cosmetic wear. Reliable transportation.

This vehicle strikes the perfect balance between sophisticated luxury and everyday reliability. The exterior finish maintains a high-gloss shine, accented by clean lines and well-preserved trim that show only minor, honest signs of careful road use. Step inside to find a cabin that feels remarkably fresh; the premium upholstery offers excellent support with minimal wear, and the entire suite of onboard technology functions exactly as intended. Under the hood, the car has been consistently maintained, delivering a smooth, responsive driving experience with a quiet, confident idle and seamless gear transitions. It is a turn-key example that has been treated with genuine respect, making it an ideal choice for a buyer looking for a dependable, well-presented, and high-performing machine.

Presented here is an exceptionally well-maintained vehicle that exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic discipline. This automobile has been curated to meet the requirements of the discerning driver, offering a refined balance of performance and long-term reliability. Its condition reflects a history of consistent care, ensuring a driving experience that remains both sophisticated and dependable. We invite you to acquire this distinguished selection, representing a superior value proposition within its class.
